nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs Mon-Fri at 4 PM IST (after NSE close)

nodes.name: Fetch Stock Prices
nodes.notes: Fetches close prices from Yahoo Finance for 3 stocks

nodes.name: Format Alert Message
nodes.notes: Formats the alert message with stock details

nodes.name: Send Email Alert
nodes.notes: Sends email alert to fund manager (configure SMTP credentials)

nodes.name: Log - No Alert Needed
nodes.notes: Logs when no stock triggered the threshold
